note_text:
Patient: 50F presenting with metastatic malignant neoplasm.
Conservative management including disease-modifying medication, NSAIDs was attempted without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with malignant neoplasm.
Referring oncology physician requests authorization for chemotherapy.

Patient: 31F presenting with locally advanced right malignant neoplasm.
No conservative therapy has been documented yet.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with malignant neoplasm.
Referring oncology physician requests authorization for chemotherapy.

Patient: 79M presenting with stage malignant neoplasm.
No conservative therapy has been documented yet.
Imaging workup is still pending.
Referring oncology physician requests authorization for chemotherapy.

Patient: 39F presenting with palliative malignant neoplasm.
Conservative management including activity modification, physical therapy was attempted without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with malignant neoplasm.
Referring oncology physician requests authorization for radiation therapy.

Patient: 79M presenting with curative malignant neoplasm.
No conservative therapy has been documented yet.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with malignant neoplasm.
Referring oncology physician requests authorization for radiation therapy.

Patient: 33M presenting with malignant neoplasm.
Conservative management including disease-modifying medication was attempted over approximately 16 weeks without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with malignant neoplasm.
Referring oncology physician requests authorization for radiation therapy.

Patient: 38F presenting with suspected multiple myeloma.
Conservative management including beta-blockers, bracing was attempted without adequate improvement.
Imaging workup is still pending.
Referring oncology physician requests authorization for pet scan.

Patient: 55F presenting with suspected non-hodgkin lymphoma.
No conservative therapy has been documented yet.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with non-hodgkin lymphoma.
Referring oncology physician requests authorization for pet scan.

Patient: 41M presenting with non-hodgkin lymphoma.
Conservative management including antiarrhythmic medication, NSAIDs was attempted without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with non-hodgkin lymphoma.
Referring oncology physician requests authorization for pet scan.

Patient: 31M presenting with acute lymphoblastic leukemia.
Conservative management including physical therapy, dietary and lifestyle modification was attempted over approximately 6 weeks without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with acute lymphoblastic leukemia.
Referring oncology physician requests authorization for targeted therapy.

gold.imaging_evidence: findings consistent with acute lymphoblastic leukemia
